multimedia.alt: It's Confirmed: Japan Has Decided 2026's Top 10 Anime
multimedia.caption: Imagen de portada del artículo

fullArticle:
Japan's biggest streaming platforms can provide one of the clearest snapshots of what anime audiences in Japan are actually watching, and U-Next's latest rankings offer an early look at 2026's biggest anime hits. Covering viewership from January 1 through June 8, the list highlights the series that dominated the country's largest streaming service during the year's first five months.

Rather than focusing on critic scores or social media buzz, U-Next ranked titles strictly by total viewers, according to the statistics from PR Times. The platform, which hosts more than 400,000 movies, TV series, and anime, crowned familiar blockbusters alongside several breakout newcomers.
